UNH.rationale: UNH has suffered a severe -48.3% drawdown over the past year, compressing its P/E to 20.5x (well below its 1-year range of 9.5-38.7x), while fundamentals remain solid with $447.6B revenue and 12.8% ROE, creating a contrarian value opportunity for patient investors.

Net margin of 2.9% and operating margin of 4.2% indicate room for profitability improvement
